title: rubus hirtus var. hebetatus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. hebetatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a type of wild raspberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. hebetatus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
